title: Color Theme - Switching theme while Phone is set to Dark Theme
scenario: User can switch between color themes (Follow Phone Theme, Light, Dark), with the selected theme applied immediately, persisted across restarts, and correctly reflecting the phone's dark mode setting.
steps: 1. Open the app and navigate to the theme settings.
2. Verify the default theme is set to 'Follow Phone Theme'.
3. Set the phone to Dark Mode.
4. Observe that the app theme changes to Dark automatically.
6. Verify the app theme changes to Light immediately.
10. Verify the app theme changes to Dark immediately.
13. Switch the theme back to 'Follow Phone Theme'.
14. Verify the check mark moves to 'Follow Phone Theme'.
15. Tap the already-selected theme (e.g., 'Follow Phone Theme' again).
16. Verify nothing changes (no theme switch, check mark stays).
expected: The selected theme is applied immediately, persists across app restarts, and the check mark updates accordingly. Tapping the already-selected theme does nothing.
